namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.D Update(global::Demo.S src, global::Demo.D dest)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(dest);
        dest.Id = src.Id;
        return dest;
    }
